name: Possible Backdoor Dropping by Suspicious File Creation in User Temp Directory
description: Detects the creation of a file named server.exe in the %TEMP% directory, indicative of potential njRAT (Bladabindi) backdoor activity. Its presence suggests malicious behavior, including unauthorized remote access and possible data exfiltration.

filterSets.name: Possible Backdoor Dropping by Suspicious File Creation in User Temp Directory

author: Ahmed Kamal
